instructions: Read the GitHub issue from the input/ folder.
Review PRD.md for product context before implementing.
Implement the requested feature, fix, or content change.
Follow the existing project structure: src/components, src/pages, src/styles, src/assets.
Write clean, minimal code. Do not over-engineer.
Create or modify only the files needed.
Write a concise summary of what you did to output/response.md.

cliCommands: ./scripts/run-agent.sh "Read the GitHub issue from input/. Review PRD.md for context. Implement the requested changes following project structure. Write summary to output/response.md."
